retry_reason: Label not found means it does not exist; retrying the same lookup will not succeed unless the label is inserted externally.
contract_summary: This function performs a lookup of an `aa_label` by its profile vector in a red-black tree and, if found, acquires a reference (increments the refcount) on it. It returns the pointer to the label with an additional reference, transferring ownership of that reference to the caller. The caller must call `aa_put_label` (or equivalent) to release the reference when done. If the label is not found, it returns NULL without acquiring any reference. The caller is responsible for checking the return value.
